02 — Projects

Featured Work

PCB Design · Marine Robotics Club

Actuator Control Board — UBCO Marine Robotics

Designed and routed a 4-layer PCB for an actuator control system in Altium Designer. Responsible for signal routing, power connections, trace width calculations, grounding strategy, and component placement. Assembled and soldered prototypes, then verified power-on behavior using a multimeter and oscilloscope.

Altium Designer 4-Layer PCB Schematics Soldering Oscilloscope
Schematics · Power Electronics

Power Distribution Schematic

Developed actuator control schematics in Altium Designer defining signal routing and power connections. Designed buck converter stages (AP62300WU-7) for regulated voltage rails, including feedback networks, bootstrap capacitors, and output filtering to meet system power requirements.

Altium Designer Buck Converter Power Distribution Schematic Capture
Embedded Systems · APSC 171

Sustainable Folding E-Bike — Electrical Subteam

Led electrical integration for a functional folding e-bike prototype. Designed and routed wiring layouts in SolidWorks, integrated an RC remote control system, and verified steering and throttle functionality end-to-end. Collaborated across mechanical and electrical subteams to hit frame constraints.

SolidWorks RC Integration Wiring Layout Systems Integration
Hardware Verification · Lab Work

Signal Verification & Hardware Debugging

Hands-on experience using a Tektronix TDS 2012B oscilloscope for two-channel signal verification. Performed time-domain analysis, cursor measurements, and frequency verification (125 kHz shown) during PCB bring-up and course lab work throughout 1st and 2nd year.

Oscilloscope Signal Analysis PCB Bring-up Debugging
